title: Galaga
hint: 벌떼처럼 몰려오는 적을 상대하는 고전 우주 슈팅
description: Player controls a small spaceship at the bottom of the screen, shooting waves of alien enemies that attack in formation and dive toward the player.

title: Pac-Man
hint: 미로에서 점을 먹고 유령을 피하는 대표 아케이드
description: A bright maze with a hungry round character collecting pellets while being chased by colorful ghosts through narrow corridors.

title: Donkey Kong
hint: 배럴을 피하며 위층으로 올라가는 초창기 점프 액션
description: A determined hero climbs ladders and jumps over rolling barrels on stacked construction girders to rescue someone at the top.

title: Space Invaders
hint: 줄지어 내려오는 외계 침략자를 막는 상징적 슈팅
description: Rows of descending alien invaders move in unison toward defensive bunkers while a lone cannon at the bottom fires upward across a stark black sky.

title: Frogger
hint: 도로와 강을 건너 안전지대로 향하는 길찾기 액션
description: A tiny frog struggles to cross lanes of speeding traffic and then leap across moving logs and turtles on a dangerous river.
